summary: Verified Bearer token auth flow - all 10 requested features working. Fixed AuthContext login/register functions to return {success, error} format expected by LoginPage. Full flow tested: login -> token stored in localStorage -> header shows user name -> add to cart -> cart counter updates -> cart sheet shows items -> checkout shows items -> logout clears token.

issues: Missing aria-describedby attribute - accessibility warning in console

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login returns 'token' field in response body
GET /api/auth/me works with Authorization: Bearer header
GET /api/cart returns items with Bearer token
Frontend: Login stores token in localStorage
Frontend: After login, header shows user name (Admin)
Frontend: Cart sheet opens and shows items with correct prices
Frontend: Checkout page loads cart items and shows total
Frontend: After logout, Connexion button visible
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bearer token auth verified working. Key implementation: (1) axios interceptor in AuthContext.js adds 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' to all requests, (2) token stored in localStorage as 'auth_token', (3) login/register functions return {success: true/false, error: string} format, (4) Backend get_current_user() checks both cookies and Authorization header for token. All cart operations work with Bearer token. Checkout page shows cart items correctly.

verification_details.token_in_login_response: Verified - login returns 'token' field with JWT (length ~213)
verification_details.axios_interceptor: Verified - interceptor adds Bearer header to all requests
verification_details.cart_with_bearer: Verified - cart add/get work with Bearer token

fix_applied.issue: login/register functions didn't return {success, error} format expected by LoginPage
fix_applied.fix: Wrapped axios calls in try/catch, return {success: true, ...data} on success, {success: false, error: message} on failure
